blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,100 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 24.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
